programme.title: South Park: T.M.I.

programme.title: South Park: Pee

programme.title: South Park: Pre-School

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie

programme.title: South Park: Insecurity
programme.desc: Cartman signs up for a home security system.

programme.title: The Closer: Living Proof
programme.desc: A long-brewing feud leads to a stabbing on Christmas Eve and the accidental death of a patriarch in a case that threatens to derail everyone's holiday plans. Brenda is especially put out since her parents are in town with a special announcement.

programme.title: The Closer: Living Proof
programme.desc: A blood feud within a refugee family from Kosovo results in another victim, forcing Brenda and her team, along with Captain Raydor, to continue their investigation on Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Closer: An Ugly Game
programme.desc: The routine arrest of a crack addict exposes a questionable rehab facility and leads Brenda and her squad on a race to find a missing young woman. The case leads Fritz to reveal to Brenda some ugly truths about her past.

programme.title: The Closer: Unknown Trouble
programme.desc: A murder investigation leads the team to the owner of a music label; Brenda is sued.

programme.desc: When a mysterious lady grants a woman 12 wishes at Christmas and they magically come true, she must work to set things right after the fallout.

programme.desc: A storm paralyses the entire Rocky Mountains leaving a bride's wedding plans derailed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.desc: Mike Galanos puts a spotlight on news and developments in criminal investigations.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Woman Wronged
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home. His 19-year-old son names his hospitalized mother, Michelle Byrom, as the mastermind of the murder. A team of lawyers unearths a history of violence, and a confession that points to an alternate suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Innocence and the Intern
programme.desc: An elderly white widow is brutally murdered in Greenwood, S.C., and Edward Lee Elmore, an African American handyman, is quickly found guilty and sentenced to death. A tenacious legal intern comes across the case and tries to save him.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Yamashita's Gold
programme.desc: Josh heads to the Philippines, searching for gold hidden by Japan in WWII.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: America's Lost WWII Hero
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the case of lost World War II hero Gertrude 'Tommy' Tompkins of the Women Air Force Service Pilots, who went missing when her P-51 Mustang crashed. Josh joins search teams using cutting-edge technology to bring the lost hero home.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ghost Ship of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: Josh tackles the mystery of The Griffon, the first ship to be lost in the Great Lakes. With a state-of-the-art submarine, Josh dives to find a ship so elusive that it's known as 'The Holy Grail of Shipwrecks'.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Unearthed: Lost Predator of the Deep
programme.desc: Unearthed with extra facts and bonus footage: Josh Gates travels to Mexico and South Africa in search of fossilized megalodon teeth. Alongside shark experts, he dives into shark-infested waters to find out what happened to the mighty Meg.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: Outlaw architect Michael Reynolds doesn't just live off the grid, he builds off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Legend of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Josh heads to the jungles of Central America to investigate the legendary crystal skull that was discovered by a renowned adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones. Josh probes whether the skull is a lost relic or archaeology's tallest tale.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: Outlaw architect Michael Reynolds doesn't just live off the grid, he builds off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Ruby Slippers
programme.desc: Josh investigates the theft of the ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in the 1939 classic movie, The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Canyons
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face down the high desert canyons of Matt's home of 20 years: southern Utah. Without knives or any modern supplies, they attempt to survive and seek rescue in this harsh terrain that's more favorable to rattlesnakes and mountain lions.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Grin and Bear It
programme.desc: Joe and Matt trek through the Alleghany Mountains of Pennsylvania, where Joe grew-up and first learned survival skills. Traveling in freezing rain, blocked by steep ravines, and deep in bear country, they're racing against Mother Nature to get out alive.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Peruvian Alien Skull and Baltic Sea UFO
programme.desc: In Peru a tiny skeleton resists medical explanation and some believe it is either a missing link in human evolution, or proof of extra-terrestrial contact. In the Baltic Sea wreck detectives find a huge disc on the seabed.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Aliens, Monsters and Demons: The New Evidence
programme.desc: There are global phenomena that science cannot explain. There are credible eye witness reports of UFOs, shocking discoveries of mysterious beasts and increased reports of paranormal and demonic activity.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Voodoo Zombies/ Life After Death
programme.desc: Voodoo Zombies explores claims of the existence of zombies in Haiti. In Life After Death patients experience strange effects after life saving transplant operations.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Flannan Lighthouse and Aleshenka: Russian Mummy
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Primal Fear
programme.desc: Mountain man Luke and a homeschooling mom and triathlete named Lindsey are dropped into the dry and thorny landscape of Africa's Namibia, surrounded by some of the deadliest apex predators on the continent.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Two survivalists are dropped on a deserted Fijian island. They must battle the elements, as well as each other’s annoyances, as they try to survive 21 days together. With blistering heat, minimal water and scarce food, this will be no honeymoon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Nothing Ordinary Here
programme.desc: Erin wants a blue dress for her destination wedding, but she must first convince her skeptical entourage. Kate is in search of a unique dress that incorporates colour. Heather's entourage is shocked when she proudly shows off her flower-patterned gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Til Dress Do Us Part
programme.desc: After losing 100 pounds, Stephanie wants to show off her new curves in a sexy wedding dress. Christine is looking for a traditional white gown to wear for her vow renewal ceremony. In for her fitting, Akisha is worried her dress won't impress her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Tight, Strapless and Sexy!
programme.desc: Whytnee wants a sexy dress to suit her vixen image, Carla wants to show more skin than her mother would like, and 52-years-young Dina is ready to try on her gown, saying it will fit right if it fits tight.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Persia has flown from L.A. in search of a $14K Pnina dress, but no one can locate it. Katrice's two brothers, NFL stars Thomas and Julius Jones, secretly plan to purchase her gown. Fitting bride Brittany is shocked by an unwanted addition to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Hell Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: It's a family affair as the sister of star NBA player Stephen Curry hunts for her dream wedding dress. Cami Lee is back with her over the top mom who will stop at nothing to make sure Cami doesn't get a black dress, including hunting Randy down for help.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Maja's Story
programme.desc: Maja moves to Houston to undertake a difficult weight-loss journey with the support of her boyfriend Christian. But when Christian decides he's had enough and leaves Maja high and dry, she will discover that the only person she can count on is herself.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Leading a Double Life
programme.desc: A family suffers the effects of mould, mice and flea infestations because their upstairs neighbor and landlord has acquired one of the show's most massive hoards to date.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Holding Mom Hostage
programme.desc: When hot-tempered David moved back in with his 93-year-old mother, he quickly filled her home with clutter. Now, the dangerous living conditions, and David's short fuse, have his elderly mom cornered.

programme.desc: A family suffers the effects of mould, mice and flea infestations because their upstairs neighbor and landlord has acquired one of the show's most massive hoards to date.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Holding Mom Hostage
programme.desc: When hot-tempered David moved back in with his 93-year-old mother, he quickly filled her home with clutter. Now, the dangerous living conditions, and David's short fuse, have his elderly mom cornered.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: The Court Said No, We Were Too Young
programme.desc: A woman searches for her beloved sister, whom she tried to adopt years ago, but hasn't seen since she was five years old. After a life of longing, a couple is desperate to find the son they placed for adoption 50 years ago when they were teens.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: The Last Time I Saw My Mother, I Was 5 Years Old
programme.desc: A man searches for his birth mother, whose disappearance when he was 5 years old has haunted him his entire life. A woman hoping to meet any member of her biological family is able to heal the emotional wounds of a total stranger.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Summer's End
programme.desc: The family celebrates the end of summer together at a nearby water park.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Quints on the Run
programme.desc: Casey signs up for a five km trail race and decides to make it a family experience by pushing the babies along in the stroller.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: When Danielle's Away, the Quints Will Play
programme.desc: With Danielle out of town for a work conference, Adam must take care of all six kids for the weekend. Although parenting solo is overwhelming, Adam has huge plans in store for his little ladies. A routine eye checkup for Hazel results in shocking news.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: It's Beginning to Look a Lot like Quintmas
programme.desc: After getting bad news about Hazel, Danielle's determined to make this the best Christmas ever. But Adam has different plans for the holiday, which may sour the celebration. The quints perform in the Christmas show, but stage fright may take center stage.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I'm a Rockstar, Baby!
programme.desc: As the lead singer of one of Canada's most famous rock bands, Kelly Jay has lived quite a life and he has collected a massive hoard to prove it.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Prison of Garbage

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Lil' Squid

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Island

programme.title: American Dad!: A Jones for a Smith
programme.desc: Stan puts down liberal social programs because he thinks they're a waste of money and gives Francine a hard time for lending a helping hand at the local homeless shelter. When Stan develops an addiction and needs help, he suddenly has a change of heart.

programme.desc: Blanche's brother, Clayton, comes to Miami for a visit, and Blanche goes all out fixing him up on blind dates. However, Rose learns the truth: Clayton is gay and is afraid to tell Blanche the truth about himself.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Zanzibar Leopard
programme.desc: Forrest sets out on a history-making expedition in Zanzibar, revealing species that have never before been filmed. He captures evidence that leads to an unforgettable conclusion on the Zanzibar Leopard, an animal that was declared extinct 25 years ago.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dodo of the North
programme.desc: Forrest travels to the Faroe Islands to look for any trace of the Great Auk. The search takes him through some of the most scenic and rugged terrain he's ever attempted in his passionate search for a large flightless seabird that has been long forgotten.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Recovered Evidence: Florida Black Panther
programme.desc: Forrest searches the Everglades for the black panther, a creature that's been rumoured to exist for years. Discoveries suggest there may be some truth in the rumours.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Galapagos Giant
programme.desc: Forrest is in the Galapagos seeking the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal that was only seen once, over 100 years ago. The clues are here, along with an abundance of incredibly unique species, raising hopes of a historic discovery.

programme.title: Little Giants: Murderous Mouse
programme.desc: The team scours the Sonoran Desert for North America's mightiest mouse: the carnivorous grasshopper mouse. An impressive vertical leap, size-defying bite force, and bone-shaking howl allow this rodent to transform into a vicious scorpion kiler at night.

programme.title: Little Giants: Winged Warrior
programme.desc: Bradley and Billy are hunting for dragons deep in the rainforests of Thailand. The flying dragon rules the jungle canopy, and the team hope to discover how this lizard's ability to glide has enabled it to dominate its environment for 250 million years.

programme.title: Little Giants: Microzilla
programme.desc: A global expedition to spotlight the astonishing abilities of tiny animals begins in the Mexican desert as Bradley Trevor Greive and Billy Almon track down and test the jaw-dropping, almost supernatural abilities of the giant horned lizard.

programme.title: Little Giants: Adorable Assassin
programme.desc: The team heads to Madagascar to study the recently discovered Goodman's mouse lemur, one of the smallest primates on the planet. This velvet pinball makes up for its tiny size with its incredible agility, breakneck speed and startling ferocity.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Galapagos Giant

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocs in the City
programme.desc: Steve is called in Mexico to investigate the proximity of the crocodiles in Tampico.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fluffy Puppy Party
programme.desc: A pit bull puppy longs to explore the city, but first he needs to get the hang of walking. A newborn Collie overcomes her shyness to run with the pack.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Cat Fight!
programme.desc: Emile and Mike can't leave their cats alone as one will viciously attack the other. The couple is at their breaking point with the bloody attacks. Justin and Susanne can’t agree on how to handle their energetic Bengal cat who constantly attacks.

programme.title: The Zoo: An Elephant's Trust
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring. Monty the adorable otter needs to visit the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: Training Dragons
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the Children's Zoo's keepers, a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results and the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: Give a Dog a Home: Live!
programme.desc: There are thousands of animals in shelters across the U.S. in need of good, loving homes. Now Animal Planet, with Best Friends Animal Society, wants to connect these animals directly to our viewers, live and in real time.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Long Time Coming
programme.desc: In the 100th episode, Tia and team try to nurse a dog back to health in one of the worse cases of neglect they have ever seen. And, ten years after Hurricane Katrina, one of the survivors finally has a shot at forever home. Includes a special Aftershow.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Street Dog Named Desire
programme.desc: When a reputed dog napper dumps a dog at Villalobos, Mariah scrambles to find the owner. A new parolee needs Tia's help when he realizes he is in over his head. And, after having her last adoption fall through, Smack has a second chance at a loving home.

programme.title: Tanked!: Gabriel Iglesias' Fluffy Tank
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Gabriel 'Fluffy' Iglesias wants a tank for his newly renovated office. Wayde and Brett attempt to combine Gabriel's love of vintage buses into a pair of unique tanks but a grand theft heist at the shop could put on the brakes.

programme.title: Tanked!: Howie Mandel is the Brains Behind ATM
programme.desc: Howie Mandel contacts ATM to build a tank for his production office. The comedian and television host has difficulty making up his mind so Wayde and Brett must design a tank without any guidance.

programme.title: Movie: I Can Do Bad All by Myself
programme.desc: A singer with a drinking problem becomes the unwilling parent to three troubled teens who have nowhere else to turn. Though she seems to want nothing to do with them, new circumstances inspire her to change her situation.

programme.title: Movie: The Family That Preys
programme.desc: Two families of different backgrounds have to learn to work together despite the odds against them.

programme.desc: The First family prepares for the inauguration ball when tragic events threaten the First Family and the White House staff.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: The Pilot
programme.desc: Andi braves the highs and lows of her special day. Karen makes a difficult decision. Sabrina entertains the prospect of new love.

programme.title: Copwatch America: Copwatchers
programme.desc: In NYC two opposing groups of copwatchers take to the streets to police the police, disrupt the system and demand justice. In Atlanta, a group of copwatchers embark on a covert operation to raise awareness of growing police terrorism in ATL.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wheels
programme.desc: The guys have a chance to buy a super rare 1970's Indian mini-motorcycle but first they need to find out if it is a fake or the real deal.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chumlee's Dummies
programme.desc: The guys consider buying a 1939 Allied Forces World War II plane.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Smells Like Pawn Spirit
programme.desc: A guy brings in a Charles Lindbergh doll from the 1920s. Someone brings in an antique poster advertising a sword-swallowing act. A man brings in a harmonica that once belonged to Steven Tyler.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Man. Make. Fire.
programme.desc: Rick and the Old Man eye a 1949 Hudson Commodore. A premium luxury ride of the post-war era.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spare the Rodman
programme.desc: The ex-wife of NBA star Dennis Rodman drops by and tries to sell a collection of Rodman's signed jerseys.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Road Test
programme.desc: A guitar that belonged to The Who's bassist strikes a chord with Rick. Then, Rick and Lili get the presidential treatment when a customer brings in a Richard Nixon paper dress. The guys decide it's time to put the Old Man's driving skills to the test.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Shufflin' and Hustlin'
programme.desc: An early, illustrated version of Rip Van Winkle is brought into the shop. Then, Corey and Chum encounter a candle in the shape of President Richard Nixon's head. And later, the guys take the Old Man out to play shuffleboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Creature
programme.desc: Catch the Pawn Stars as they come face-to-face with a life-size Creature from the Black Lagoon. Then, Rick gets the inside scoop with a handwritten love letter from Judy Garland to Frank Sinatra. Also, Chum and Corey try to scare Rick at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Avengers Assemble
programme.desc: Two original No.1 comic books from the 'Avengers' and 'Giant Size X-Men' series fly into the shop. Then, Corey is faced with a mystery when he is presented with a cane belonging to William Pinkerton from the infamous Pinkerton detective agency.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn in Space
programme.desc: Explore the cosmos with the Pawn Stars when a cast signed helmet from the 1960s TV show 'Lost in Space' orbits the shop. Then, a strange, antique object surfaces and has Rick and Corey scratching their heads.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Double Your Pawn
programme.desc: Harry Carey's collection of nearly 200 celebrity autographs; a 1900s Wrigley Gum vending machine; a measuring device known as a railroad equilibristat; a 1960s Jimmy Jet toy.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: My Country, Pawn of Thee
programme.desc: Handwritten lyrics to 'My Country, Tis of Thee'; a WWII era Linemar Space Explorer Toy; a United Nations Helmet from Somalia; a giant bell from the classic El Rancho Hotel and Casino.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wound Up Rick
programme.desc: An autograph Led Zeppelin album; an antique whistle collection; a Doonesbury cartoon pencils; a self-winding clock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Here's Looking At You, Pawn!
programme.desc: A first edition of the 1911 novel 'Peter Pan' finds Rick, but he’s also swept up by a piece of scrap metal from a fallen airship. A seller hopes to wow Rick with a kneeling Thepanom statue. Corey decides if a 'Casablanca' poster is worth its high price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawning Picasso
programme.desc: Corey snipes an 1800s prototype rifle made by the inventor of the Baker Rifle. Then, Rick checks out one of Marlon Brando's prized personal possessions, and an original Pablo Picasso shapes up to be a great addition to the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Game of Pawns
programme.desc: Winter is coming when Rick sees an autographed Game of Thrones item. Then, Chumlee stirs up commotion with an Amazonian blowgun, and picker Spencer Victory stops by with an ancient Middle Eastern sword. Later, Rick checks out a 1900s DNC collectible.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Shooting Pawns

programme.title: Paradise Islands: Born of Fire
programme.desc: The islands of Indonesia, Malaysia and New Guinea are the biologically richest on earth. There are tigers and elephants, rhinos and birds of paradise. But why this profusion of life? Follow the story of the islands, from their violent and fiery birth.

programme.title: Paradise Islands: Sun Kings
programme.desc: The Paradise Islands stretch along the equator, with tropical sun driving life on these islands. They are home to the oldest, richest rainforests on Earth. The sunlit canopy is home to gibbons and hornbills, while tigers and rhinos roam the forest floor.

programme.title: Paradise Islands: Creatures of the Moon
programme.desc: The reefs and coastal forests, beaches and shallow waters of the Paradise Islands are amongst the richest on Earth. This is a world under the sway of the moon. Creatures such as proboscis monkeys, fiddler crabs and whale sharks move to the moon's rhythm.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare on Main Street

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Doom on the Titanic
programme.desc: New discoveries are challenging everything we know about the sinking of the Titanic, revealing that the disaster wasn't caused by a freak accident and that it may have been doomed from the start.

programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.desc: New discoveries are challenging everything we know about the sinking of the Titanic, revealing that the disaster wasn't caused by a freak accident and that it may have been doomed from the start.

programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare on Main Street
programme.desc: A railroad bridge on the edge of disaster, a nightmare in a fairy-tale town, and a massive cathedral in calamity are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Lost Skyscrapers
programme.desc: A ground-breaking experiment reveals how ancient Egyptians built the giant obelisks of Thebes, and new discoveries at this holy site could explain why these mysterious marvels triggered the downfall of the pharaohs and the end of Egypt's golden age.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.desc: A new informant is willing to give up vital information about dealers in exchange for help with his legal troubles.

programme.title: Crime 360: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: Cutting edge forensics are used to solve the case of a missing man who is believed to have been murdered by two brothers.

programme.title: Crime 360: Senseless
programme.desc: Two adults and four young children were killed during a gunfight. Spent bullets, shell casings and a missing neighbour all hold clues to the family massacre.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down in cold blood. The case kicks into high gear when Lt. Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness who played an unwitting role in the bloodbath.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A park ranger discovers the corpse of amateur boxer Corey Edge floating in a shallow creek. Lt. Joe Kenda investigates a rogue's gallery of hustlers, thugs and career criminals. Kenda realizes the real killers have been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Sing Sing, Little Bird
programme.desc: A romantic rendezvous is cut short by a violent home invasion, leaving young business owner Kelly Knudson bleeding to death on the floor. Lt Joe Kenda is short on leads, until he learns of an ex-roommate with an axe to grind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cynthia
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. When all leads dry up, the case runs cold. But years later, Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Collision Course
programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street. When a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Shattered: No Way Out
programme.desc: In 1993, a child in need of help leads to a shootout in broad daylight, and an officer down. The gunmen flee the scene, but Alabama police are not about to let them get away.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A teenage party at the edge of the city turns horrific after the discovery of a woman's corpse. Detectives easily surmise that she was strangled with her own shoelace, but figuring out her identity proves difficult.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Collision Course
programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street. When a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Shattered: No Way Out
programme.desc: In 1993, a child in need of help leads to a shootout in broad daylight, and an officer down. The gunmen flee the scene, but Alabama police are not about to let them get away.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A teenage party at the edge of the city turns horrific after the discovery of a woman's corpse. Detectives easily surmise that she was strangled with her own shoelace, but figuring out her identity proves difficult.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cynthia
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. When all leads dry up, the case runs cold. But years later, Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: Who Killed Jane Doe?: Daughter, Sister, Diamond, Doe
programme.desc: The body of an unidentified young woman turns up on the side of an Oklahoma highway. Her name remains a mystery... until investigators find a family looking for their missing daughter, who's become entrapped in a suspicious relationship.

programme.title: Who Killed Jane Doe?: A Girl Has No Name
programme.desc: The Apple Valley in California's Mojave Desert keeps secrets well hidden. A body of an unidentified Jane Doe is discovered there in 1994, but it will take nearly two decades to discovery all of the passion, jealousy and drama that led to her death.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Big Sky Murder
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 when she finds her husband shot to death. The investigation reveals allegations of harassment from the victim's ex-lover and eventually uncovers a complex trail of deceit, in a murder that was years in the making.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Silencer
programme.desc: With the help of a neighbor, an injured woman calls 911 saying an intruder broke into her boyfriend's home and shot them both. Police respond and find the boyfriend executed. Cops must decipher strange evidence left behind to identify the killer.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Devil's Voice
programme.desc: When two girls from neighboring counties disappear and are found murdered, one family receives multiple taunting calls from the kidnapper. Investigators work to track him down and succeed with they discover a clue delivered by the killer himself.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Unholy Ghost
programme.desc: Church parishioners call 911 when they find their priest unconscious, after he fails to show up for Mass who has been stabbed to death. Police uncover an earlier call made by the victim himself, and track a missing cell phone to a find deranged killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Daddy's Got A Gun
programme.desc: A decorated police officer and single father relies on his kind and generous neighbors to help care for his beloved daughter. When she accuses one of them of molesting her, anger boils over, all hell breaks loose... and blood flows in the streets.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Driveway of Death
programme.desc: In the idyllic hills of Carmel Canyon, California, wealthy neighbors get into a dispute over everything from shared roads and bridges to upkeep of their respective properties. Anger finally boils over and the feud is resolved with fatal gunfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Burn Neighbor, Burn
programme.desc: In peaceful Alden, New York, siblings who live in neighboring houses get into a conflict when their prodigal brother returns home. Soon, the family is at each other's throats until their war finally comes to a shocking, fiery end.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: More Than a Babysitter
programme.desc: On the surface, Tina Young, has it all - a nice husband, good children, and dear friends, the Zalenski family. Her picture perfect life spirals out of control when she becomes addicted to heroin and discovers her new lover and drug dealer, Larry Tooley.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Death Ride
programme.desc: Two mentally unhinged ex-military men team up for a deadly crime spree as their obsession with living life on the edge grows out of control.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Fascination With Death
programme.desc: An unlikely brotherhood is forged between two homicidal men who have psychotic fantasies of murder, maiming and cannibalism.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Fruit of the Family Tree
programme.desc: A woman searching for acceptance from her family unexpectedly finds passionate love with her uncle. When their families turn on them in the face of taboo, they flee to start a new life in paradise.

programme.title: Modern Sniper: Coast Guard
programme.desc: The role of the HITRON UNIT and their mission to stop the flow of illegal drugs into America with one sniper shot at a time.

programme.title: Modern Sniper: Advanced Sniper
programme.desc: Look at the advanced training techniques that transform these ordinary men into intelligent soldiers.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Argo: The Secret Story
programme.desc: America is at its knees as the infamous US Embassy Hostage crisis begins, but then the CIA discovers that six diplomats have secretly escaped. When they recruit in their ace 'rescue' agent Tony Mendez to get them out, he devises a 'Hollywood'- plan.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Fortress of War
programme.desc: The Story of how two CIA operatives, in search of Osama bin Laden, stop a Taliban uprising in an Afghan fortress. They are outnumbered leaving one operative to pay the ultimate price.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing 'Mad Dog' Gaddafi
programme.desc: In 2011 Libyan dictator Muammar Gaddafi was overthrown in a bloody civil war. What few people know is that the CIA had been planning to orchestrate a Libyan revolt for 30 years and that the man leading the rebel forces was a long-time CIA ally.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Castro and the Cold Cream
programme.desc: The true story of how the CIA turned Fidel Castro's lover into a deadly assassin and sent her on a mission to kill their formidable enemy.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Fortress of War
programme.desc: The Story of how two CIA operatives, in search of Osama bin Laden, stop a Taliban uprising in an Afghan fortress. They are outnumbered leaving one operative to pay the ultimate price.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing 'Mad Dog' Gaddafi
programme.desc: In 2011 Libyan dictator Muammar Gaddafi was overthrown in a bloody civil war. What few people know is that the CIA had been planning to orchestrate a Libyan revolt for 30 years and that the man leading the rebel forces was a long-time CIA ally.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Castro and the Cold Cream
programme.desc: The true story of how the CIA turned Fidel Castro's lover into a deadly assassin and sent her on a mission to kill their formidable enemy.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: John Dillinger
programme.desc: John Dillinger was the most brazen of the infamous criminals of the Great Depression, and probably the most brutal, credited with a string of bank robberies and at least a dozen murders across Indiana in 1933.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: John Gotti: The Teflon Don
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.desc: Find holiday decor from hospitality expert, Valerie Parr Hill.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Building Hope
programme.desc: Ingrid was in the process of converting a small cottage into a modern home when she suffered an aneurysm and two strokes. Her daughter took over, but needs Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Midcentury Modern Rustic
programme.desc: Brock and Chase tackle a lake house and turn it into a mid-century modern oasis. They give the existing fireplace an easy-to-use gas insert and creating a custom entertainment center with a barn wood backdrop.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Philly Street Flippin'
programme.desc: Licensed contractor, real estate expert and designer Rachel Street flips an historic row home in her hometown of Philadelphia, PA. She transforms the first floor into an open-concept space and exposes the brick along one side of the home.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Huge
programme.desc: Rachel renovates a grand row home in the up-and-coming neighborhood of East Passyunk. Immediately, she faces structural problems in the century-old property and has to rebuild the entire exterior wall. She also revives the ornate turrets.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Small
programme.desc: Rachel Street tackles a tiny row home in South Philly's Whitman district. After extending the second floor to add an additional 150 square feet, she makes the space seem brighter and larger by white washing the interior brick and using light colours.

programme.title: Philly Revival: A Troubled Twin
programme.desc: Rachel tackles a twin row home in Germantown that was partially rehabbed by a previous owner. She quickly discovers the previous work is less than perfect and is forced to rebuild the rotting roof, install new brick on the exterior and add new insulation.

programme.title: Philly Revival: An Urban Retreat
programme.desc: Rachel Street renovates a huge, turn-of-the-century home in the Mt. Airy district. She decides to restore several of the property's original features, including a walled-up sun porch, elaborate fireplaces and cabinetry.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Pie-shaped Problem House
programme.desc: A couple loves to host family at their home in Dewey Beach, DE, but no one wants to stay in their tiny, awkwardly shaped guest house. With a limited budget, Marnie gets creative and bold with her design choices to transform the house.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Ideal Family Deck With a Wood-Burning Fireplace
programme.desc: Randy and Kim want a place for their kids to hang out with their friends, as well as a place to connect and bond as a family, so they've decided to turn their old patio into a family party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: The Ultimate Luxury Deck with a Two-Story Waterfall
programme.desc: A couple challenges the crew to build a deck that maximizes their gorgeous views, and adds 1000 square feet of outdoor living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Three Decks, Three Pergolas, a Swim Spa, and a Water Feature
programme.desc: Brad and Ronnie have gorgeous mountain views and five acres of land, but their patio and decks are faded and cracked. They have four separate outdoor spaces and the Mega Crew is challenged to update all of them.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Triple Threat Deck With a Pool
programme.desc: The team builds their biggest and most expensive masterpiece over four months on a $750,000 budget. Big problems start after finishing the deck, when freezing temperatures put an indefinite hold on finishing the pool.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Culinary Cornhuskers
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his Omaha food adventure with breakfast from a fast made-from-scratch joint offering a crazy good egg boat with hash browns. For lunch, Ali tips his hat to an iconic Omaha lunch with a housemade Reuben.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Far From The Farm
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Des Moines the way Iowans do, with crisp and cheesy breakfast nachos. Then it's onto a roasted chicken lunch with comforting mashed potatoes and onion rings, before snacking on a truly divine Napoleon.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Chefs' Favorite Foods
programme.desc: Earl Campbell and Michael dig into juicy brisket and warm peach cobbler at Texas' most famous barbecue restaurants.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent D.C. Dining
programme.desc: Michael and Jenni 'JWoww' Farley, reality TV star and winner of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition, team up to tackle the best classic barbecue, freshest farmhouse burgers and most outrageous microbrews our nation's capital has to offer.

programme.title: Baked: New York: If You Can Bake It There
programme.desc: Tom Papa heads to New York City to get a slice of the Big Apple's diverse food scene. At The Doughnut Project, he meets up with comedian Jim Gaffigan to make the ultimate New York mashup: a glazed doughnut covered in everything bagel toppings.

programme.title: Baked: Los Angeles: A Toast to Tinseltown
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Tom Papa stops by Vito's Pizza, where the crust is so special it needs a bodyguard. At Canter's Deli, he makes a Monte Cristo sandwich. At Creme Caramel LA, he samples the glitter-covered meringue known as unicorn poop.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Be sure to finish all your veggies because we've got the scoop on the best desserts around. Ted Allen, Alton Brown, Giada De Laurentiis and Bobby Flay are sharing their favorite sinful sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Baked: New York: If You Can Bake It There

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Providence
programme.desc: Jordan Andino is in Providence, Rhode Island, a small town bursting with late night eating.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Jordan Andino starts his night in Philadelphia at the Taproom on 19th, learning the secrets behind the city's most popular wings. For dinner, he's off to Lloyd Whiskey Bar in Fishtown.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: San Antonio
programme.desc: Jordan Andino is checking out the food scene after dark in San Antonio, where his first stop is The Hoppy Monk for rabbit barbacoa tacos. Then he heads to Cullum's Attagirl, an authentic chicken shack dishing out Texas-style fried chicken.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Halifax

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Toronto
programme.desc: Jordan Andino is exploring the culinary delights of Toronto, Canada's most diverse city.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: War and Peace

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hi, Jinx!/ Pete's Junkyard Helpers
programme.desc: Emmy Lou meets Jinx the cat and gets the gang to help her find the kitty a new home. The Happy Helpers run Pete's junkyard while he takes his Mama out to lunch for her birthday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Haunted Hot Rod/ Pete's Ghostly Gala
programme.desc: Mickey wants to race the Haunted Hot Rod, a ghostly Roadster who only races on Halloween. The Happy Helpers try to catch three ghosts who threaten to ruin Pete's Halloween Party.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Martian Minnie's Tea Party
programme.desc: Begin the countdown! Minnie’s on her way to Mars on an urgent mission! Her assignment is to help her outer space counterpart, Martian Minnie host a tea party for our Clubhouse friends throughout the galaxy!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pet Project
programme.desc: Daisy ends up with three pets for the Pet Parade, a baby elephant, giraffe and a bunny.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Hallie Halloween/ Don't Fence Me In
programme.desc: During Trick or Treat, Hallie gets caught on another kid’s Halloween costume. When the marbles from Gulpy Gulpy Gators fly across the yard, Doc and the toys try to catch them.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Comet
programme.desc: Mickey and pals are excitedly anticipating the arrival of Mickey's Comet.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Treat
programme.desc: The Sensational Six enlist viewers' help in getting to the Trick-or-Treat Tower for the big Halloween party. They use a garbage can lid as Goofy the Knight's shield and a jack-o-lantern to light the way through the Foggy Forest.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie and Daisy's Flower Shower
programme.desc: With the help of Professor Von Drake's special Pitter Patter Glitter, Minnie and Daisy turn normal clouds into rain clouds so they can water their flower gardens in time for the big flower show.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Boo-Hoo to You!/ It's Glow Time
programme.desc: For Halloween, Dad surprises Doc with Sebastian, a motion sensor ghost.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!
programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Vampirina: Acrobat Boris/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: Boris gets an invitation to reunite with an acorbatic flying troupe. Vee and Poppy run a lemonade stand.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Donald's Roadster Round-Up / The Daisy Dance!
programme.desc: On a trip to the convenience store, Donald and Pluto lose all the roadsters; The Happy Helpers take over Clarabelle's dance class.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Roadsterettes! / Oh Happy Day!
programme.desc: Famous race car driver Pippa Powers visits Hot Dog Hills for a reunion with her old car club. The Happy Helpers must show Mr. McSnorter how to relax on vacation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: You Quack Me Up / Tree House Trouble
programme.desc: Donald decides to win the pranking contest for April Fool's Day. When Chip and Dale have a roommate squabble, they ask the Happy Helpers to find them each a new home.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Mansion/A Doozy Night of Mystery
programme.desc: The gang spends a night in Goofy's uncle's haunted mansion. Mr. Doozy invites everyone to his hotel for a fancy dinner party but a family heirloom goes missing!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Desert Pups/ Okavango Odyssey
programme.desc: Bob gets a flat tire on a road trip with the Pugs; The Pugs look for Bob's Moms' lost locket.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Lionel's Powers / Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: Lionel gets new powers and Gekko trains him to be his "super pet." Owlette becomes best friends with Luna Girl and lets her enter HQ.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Movie: Spookley the Square Pumpkin
programme.desc: A pumpkin named Spookley is born in a pumpkin patch. He looks nothing like the other pumpkins! His shape is square, which makes the other pumpkins poke fun at him. After a terrible storm Spookley realizes it can be handy to be different.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Let Sleeper Dogs Lie/ Cat-astrophe
programme.desc: Crocker tries to trigger Sparky with a secret word. Catman confuses Sparky for his old arch-nemesis Dogman.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Scary Godparents - The Fairly Oddparents Halloween
programme.desc: On Hallowe'en, Timmy's boredom transforms everyone into their costumes.

programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Going Green/ Tattle Tail
programme.desc: Jeanette signs the Chipmunks and Chipettes up for a green living competition. Alvin likes a girl at school so he agrees to look after her talking bird, but he's nervous about the bird blabbing when he says something damaging.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick Smartpants/ Squidward Tentaclepants
programme.desc: Patrick gets conked on the head; Sandy's experimental teleportation device malfunctions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Porous Pockets/ Choir Boys

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes

programme.desc: Squidward races a purebred snail; Mr. Krabs follows Pat and Bob out on the town.

programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a very grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too.

programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: Movie: Last Chance for Christmas

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Woman Wronged
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home. His 19-year-old son names his hospitalized mother, Michelle Byrom, as the mastermind of the murder. A team of lawyers unearths a history of violence, and a confession that points to an alternate suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes

programme.desc: Rugged terrain pushes Parker's heavy machinery skills to their limit, forcing him to attempt one dangerous maneuver after another in his quest to open a legendary lost gold mine.

programme.desc: The buyers travel to Nashville where pop culture items are everywhere.

programme.desc: At an estate auction in Austin, Texas, Billy hopes a swami fortune-telling machine like the one in the movie 'Big' holds good fortune for him, while the Martins and Mark dive into a bidding war for an underwater scooter.

programme.title: Baggage Battles: Inflated Egos
programme.desc: Three auction specialists travel the world looking for unclaimed or lost property.

programme.title: Baggage Battles: Steal Drum
programme.desc: The buyers are back in Nashville bidding on an old Beatles drum and vintage Michael Jordan sneakers.

programme.title: Baggage Battles: Monster Money
programme.desc: The buyers are in Hollywood, California for one of the largest movie monster memorabilia auctions of all time.

programme.title: Baggage Battles: It's Not Easy Making Green

programme.title: Baggage Battles: Dino-Mite
programme.desc: In Knoxville, TN, the buyers do battle over vintage advertising. Sally breaks the bank bidding on an iconic dinosaur, and Billy's attempt at auction sabotage backfires.

programme.title: Baggage Battles: Big Boy Bucks
programme.desc: The buyers are in Vegas, gambling on vintage casino and advertising items, like an iconic Bob's Big Boy Burger statue. A rare Elvis recording could mean a huge payday for one of the buyers, and Mark overpays for a slot machine.

programme.title: Baggage Battles: The Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: In Toronto, the buyers visit one of the world's largest lost property auctions. Mark is tuned in to a giant old school boom box from the 8'0s, and one of the buyers finds a rare 'Wizard of Oz' piece in a sealed trunk.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Cold War
programme.desc: Parker's parents visit and offer help. Rick tries to reach 1000ox before the weather freezes him out. Tony gets shocking news that forces him to make a drastic decision about his season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Brace For Impact
programme.desc: Rick and crew fight to get as much gold as they can before they're shut down. Tony races to finish his second dredge and Parker makes a risky move.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: On target for an $8.4-million-dollar season, Parker's wash plant catches fire. Rick finishes his first season strong. Tony heads into the wilderness to find lost equipment to get his ancient dredge running. Followed by a special aftershow of 'The Dirt.'

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More Than a Wedding
programme.desc: Cheryl has recently beaten breast cancer and had her last reconstructive surgery a week ago. Jennifer is battling a rare kidney disease, and Kristin is overcoming stage four lung cancer. For these brides, their weddings are a celebration of love and life.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: New Dress -- New Beginning
programme.desc: Comedian Seth Meyers surprises an injured army vet. Southern model Ashley wants a sexy dress that also impresses her picky father. Dana returns for a fitting before her wedding with her college sweetheart at their alma mater.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: King of My Heart

programme.title: Tallest Teens
programme.desc: Meet three of the tallest teenagers in America and learn how they fit into a society designed for people several feet shorter and how will their size impact their future.

programme.title: 30 Inches Tall and Turning 18
programme.desc: Georgia Rankin is an average teenager at the height of an average two-year-old. Measuring 2 feet 7 inches tall, she's charismatic, and happy, despite suffering constant pain in her joints. We follow Georgia for a year as she seeks medical treatment.

programme.desc: Go inside the extraordinary and competitive lives of pre-teen bodybuilders whose ultimate goal is to achieve the perfect physique as we follow three families whose children eat, sleep and breathe bodybuilding.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?: Cool Koalas and Elephant Calls
