programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Founding of America
programme.desc: It is evident that Washington, D.C was inspired by the ancient world. There are Greek pillars, Roman domes and other clear examples of this. Ancient astronaut theorist Giorgio A. Tsoukalos believes there may have been otherworldly influences.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of the Cyclops
programme.desc: The mystery of the Mediterranean island of Malta lies south of Sicily and is home to megalithic structures. The massive blocks pre-date the Great Pyramid of Giza.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: Searching for Bigfoot
programme.desc: Many reported sightings of big, hairy monsters in America are also accompanied by accounts of UFO activity and unexplained lights in the sky. If the creature known as Bigfoot really exists, it could be living proof that extraterrestrials have been here.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Roswell Rock
programme.desc: A mysterious rock was discovered in Roswell, New Mexico in 2004. Now called 'The Roswell Rock, this unusually smooth stone possess unique magnetic properties.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysterious Places
programme.desc: The Bermuda Triangle, Mexico's Zone of Silence, and Peru's Puerto de Hay Marko are some of the most mysterious places on Earth. Inexplicably, UFOs are often sited near these mystical areas.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Angels and Aliens
programme.desc: A look at the existence of angels and what explanations lay behind their sightings.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mayan Conspiracy
programme.desc: The Mayan civilization dominated Central America for nearly 2000 years, but by the 9th century A.D, the Mayan people had vanished. Some experts think aliens may have had something to do with the Mayan mystery.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Satan Conspiracy
programme.desc: New interpretations of ancient texts indicate that Satan may have been an extraterrestrial who was more of an ally to humanity than an enemy by passing along knowledge that planted the seed for civilization.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysteries of the Sphinx
programme.desc: The Great Sphinx in Giza is the largest and most studied monolithic sculpture on Earth, yet it remains one of humanities greatest mysteries. This ancient monolith defies explanation and pre-dates our earliest known civilizations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Messages
programme.desc: Some believe that embedded in our most sacred religious texts, as well as in the design and location of ancient monuments, are secret messages that may reveal the purpose behind our very existence.

programme.title: Movie: Hercules, Samson and Ulysses
programme.desc: Three mythical strongmen, Hercules, Samson and Ulysses, hunt down a murderous sea monster.

programme.title: Movie: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: Perseus, son of Zeus, must battle a series of mythological beasts for Andromeda's love.

programme.title: Movie: Horror of Dracula
programme.desc: A lawyer discovers that his client is a vampire, who later puts his fiancée under a spell.

programme.title: Movie: Gorgon
programme.desc: A modern-day Gorgon turns villagers into stone.

programme.desc: A squire resorts to voodoo as a solution to an acute manpower shortage.

programme.desc: Seven people hide in a farmhouse as an army of flesh-eating zombies roam the countryside. As they come together, these strangers must decide to either flee or stay and fight.

programme.desc: A 2000-year old vampire finds that her current lover is aging fast and therefore sets out to find some 'new blood' to replace him.

programme.desc: The first snow of the season has fallen, and patrols are getting dicey. From hunters lost on a mountain in a whiteout, to head-on collisions, to patrolling the fall elk and deer hunt, officers struggle to do their jobs while contending with nature.

programme.title: Frontier Force: Marijuana Factory
programme.desc: Montana is only one of 15 states that have legalized marijuana for medicinal purposes and law enforcement officer are challenged with upholding the new controversial laws. Deputies visit a grow hose, making sure the owner has his 'green card.'

programme.title: Life and Death Row: Stroke of Midnight
programme.desc: We meet death row inmate Stacey Johnson, who's scheduled to be executed for a crime that he claims he didn't commit. We also meet Susan, whose mother was murdered in a home invasion by inmate Don Davis in 1990.

programme.title: Life and Death Row: Final Sentence
programme.desc: Hoping DNA testing proves his innocence, Stacey Johnson and his family look to have his execution stayed. The clemency hearings for Ledell Lee are also presented, an inmate who is scheduled to be executed the same night as Johnson.

programme.title: Life and Death Row: The Oath
programme.desc: Lynn Scott, the sister of death row inmate Jack Jones, worries that the number of medications he's on could mean that the lethal injection drugs won’t work properly, resulting in an agonizing death.

programme.title: Life and Death Row: Mercy
programme.desc: We follow Lynn Scott, the sister of inmate Jack Jones, and Lacey Phillips, the daughter of Jones' victim, as they attend day three of the executions.

programme.title: Life and Death Row: Last Gasp
programme.desc: We meet death row inmate Kenneth Williams, who was sentenced to death for the murder of a 57-year-old farmer named Cecil Boren.

programme.title: Life and Death Row: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: With only seven days before the possibility of execution, former U.S. Marine John Ramirez fights to survive.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Rivers of Death
programme.desc: Rivers are essential to life, but death follows wherever they flow.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Grub-a-Dub-Dub
programme.desc: This week on The Incredible Dr. Pol, there’s trauma, drama and a piglet in peril.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: May the Horse Be With You

programme.desc: Dr. T aids a fugitive turtle, a peg-legged bird and a diva Guinea pig.

programme.title: Wild Uganda
programme.desc: Uganda boasts one of the most diverse landscapes on Earth and wildlife is thriving.

programme.title: Namibia's Skeleton Coast
programme.desc: The story of how some of the world's largest creatures survive in the inhospitable deserts of Namibia.

programme.title: Namibia, Sanctuary of Giants: Mission Critical
programme.desc: A dedicated group of people work to protect refuges for Africa's iconic wildlife.

programme.title: South Africa: Clash of Currents
programme.desc: Explore South Africa's Cape region where the habitats of Africa and Antarctica collide.

programme.title: South Africa: Killers of the Kalahari
programme.desc: From the savanna to the desert, the heart of South Africa is home to everything from successful hunters and extremely odd animals.

programme.title: South Africa: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: With sunshine, sandy beaches and palm trees, South Africa's East Coast is a true paradise.

programme.title: America's Wild Spaces: Mysteries of Death Valley
programme.desc: Death Valley National Park is a place of extremes—hottest, lowest, driest...now journey to discover how this wild space is also very much alive and full of mystery.

programme.title: America's Wild Spaces: Deep into the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: It is one of Earth’s few landforms visible from space, a World Heritage site, and one of America’s most popular National Park. But visitors see only a tiny fraction of the Grand Canyon’s true beauty.

programme.title: America's Wild Spaces: Jewels of the Canyonlands
programme.desc: While Canyonlands appears stark and barren at first glance, a closer look finds life lurking behind every corner and crevice.

programme.title: America's Wild Spaces: Secret Appalachia
programme.desc: Much of the Appalachian Trail is close to major population so some believe it's not that wild. Join National Geographic on a rollercoaster ride of agonizing ascents and rewarding vistas.

programme.title: America's Wild Spaces: Glories of Glacier National Park
programme.desc: Glacier National Park is going through dramatic changes. The glaciers that give this wilderness its name will soon be gone, and the park will never be the same.

programme.title: America's Wild Spaces: Hidden Hawaii
programme.desc: Far in the Pacific, 250 miles from Honolulu come aboard a voyage led by scientists who are researching disease-plagued coral reefs, endangered monk seals and the millions of birds nesting in the volcanic islands and atolls.

programme.title: Kings of Baja
programme.desc: Eight hundred miles long and ten million years in the making, Baja is home to a punishing desert and one of the most diverse seas on the planet.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: The Chernobyl Conspiracy
programme.desc: The Chernobyl nuclear disaster was a catastrophe that changed the course of human history, and now, new discoveries reveal the real reasons behind the explosion that spawned a deadly radioactive ghost town and brought down an empire.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: NASA's Challenger Disaster
programme.desc: NASA's Space Shuttle Challenger was a deadly disaster that changed the course of space exploration forever, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the structural failure that tore the rocket apart.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Doom on the Titanic
programme.desc: New discoveries are challenging everything we know about the sinking of the Titanic, revealing that the disaster wasn't caused by a freak accident and that it may have been doomed from the start.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Conspiracy of the Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge tech to hunt for the lost NASA tapes that recorded the Apollo 11 moon landing and shed light on a possible conspiracy, as some believe their disappearance is part of a cover-up to hide the truth.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: The Hollywood Conspiracy
programme.desc: Some believe that the moon's waving American flag is the smoking gun that NASA faked the moon landing, and as a team of experts investigate this strange piece of evidence, the trail leads all the way to some of Hollywood's biggest names.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Killing Armstrong
programme.desc: Apollo 11's lunar module nearly killed Neil Armstrong during training, and some believe this close-call could explain a conspiracy to fake the moon landing. A team of experts investigate if dangers that the Apollo 11 crew faced were motive for a cover-up.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: NASA Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of America's greatest achievements is also one of its most controversial, and now, a team of experts investigate if there was a conspiracy to fake the moon landing, uncovering a secret report on hundreds of Nazis' involved in the Apollo space program.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Vehicles
programme.desc: Flying using only water power; an underwater car; a boat that is built to deliberately sink; a huge plane style boat that might revolutionize travel.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Fell From the Sky
programme.desc: Revealing some of the strangest things that have fallen from the sky around the world.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Underground
programme.desc: Featuring the largest collection of mummies; the secret bunker below New York's Grand Central Terminal; hundreds of miles of tunnels that lie beneath Las Vegas; astronomers who look at the stars two miles underground.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Jobs
programme.desc: Meet people with the strangest jobs in the world.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Places to Sleep
programme.desc: Go inside the astonishing science of the world's strangest places to sleep. In Sweden, visitors can stay at an invisible hotel. A couple has converted a relic of the cold war into a family home. And learn how to sleep in a pressurized tin can for 28 days.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Explosions
programme.desc: Explore truly bizarre explosions including an unconventional summer camp for teens with a bombastic curriculum and haute couture fashion that could save your life.

programme.desc: A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair as they battle to keep their secret from their spouses but with the stakes so high it's a truth they'll stop at nothing to hide.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Black Widower
programme.desc: Drew Peterson and his wife Kathleen appear to be a happy couple, but ten years into their marriage, things begin to sour. And when Kathleen finds out Drew is having a steamy affair with a 17-year old, a brutal fight breaks out, and ends with murder.

programme.title: Women in Prison: The Conspirator and the Good Christian
programme.desc: A millionaire housewife takes the law into her own hands, enlisting her children's help to kill her husband. A church-goer finds solace in prescription pills but when the doctors say no more, she finds another way.

programme.title: Women in Prison: The Army Girl and the Money Maker
programme.desc: A former army officer turns to drugs when she's injured on duty. When her dealer won't cut her a break, she commits the bloodiest of murders. And after the premature death of her father, an A-grade student has to become a criminal to support her family.

programme.title: Women in Prison: The Daddy's Girl and the Poet
programme.desc: When a security guard comes home to find an abusive ex-boyfriend in her bed, things quickly become explosive. And after finding her dream man, the daughter of a correctional officer gets hooked on drugs. These love birds quickly become filthy robbers.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Daughter's Fight
programme.desc: A woman is murdered, and her daughter is certain she knows who is responsible. But can she prove it? After five years a cold case turns hot, and investigators discover the suspect a pillar of the community is hiding secrets.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: A pretty social media sensation and an NBA superstar connect online. But as the relationship heats up, extortion and threats of violence turn their romance into a nightmare.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Capitol Offense
programme.desc: A mysterious figure threatens to expose the secret affair between two married politicians. Despite an outrageous cover up attempt, the situation spirals into a major public scandal, which ultimately derails multiple political careers.

programme.title: Killing Time: Mommy's Not Moving
programme.desc: When a mother is found brutally murdered, her Las Vegas community is left terrified. A tip from a convicted criminal leads detectives deep into the desert hills. Surveillance footage reveals there's definitely something sinister afoot.

programme.title: Killing Time: Evil Eye
programme.desc: Dr. Brian Stidham is found dead in a parking lot behind his office. Who would want to kill the beloved doctor? Detective Jill Isely creates a timeline of events to determine if this crime was a carjacking gone wrong, or something much more wicked.

programme.title: Killing Time: The Bodies in the River
programme.desc: A body is found floating in a New Orleans canal. Detective Ryan Vaught has little to go on until a second body surfaces. A kettle bell tied to the victim's legs becomes the clue that could unravel the entire case.

programme.title: Killing Time: Poker Faced Killer
programme.desc: A man is accused of killing his wife when his daughter describes the killer as a man with 'eyes like Daddy', but his buddies provide his alibi.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: Jaws of Death
programme.desc: When a New Jersey mother is raped and murdered in the night, her sadistic killer leaves no trace of his identity behind. Months later, a violent attack in another state gives detectives the evidence they need to put the killer away for good.

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Shady Space With a View
programme.desc: The biggest demo in Mega Decks history gets underway by tearing down 1500 square feet of stucco. Then steel framing and beams go up to support three different roof styles. Replacing the stucco with rails and a staircase opens up the views for the family.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Concrete Jungle with a Lot of Warmth
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team transforms a tiny, cramped deck into the perfect outdoor entertaining space with 1600 square feet of luxury.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Mountain Retreat with a Rocky View
programme.desc: The team contends with nearly impassable roads, mountain weather and a build site on top a granite boulder.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Minnehaha House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles a 1916 mansion in Minneapolis and builds out its dingy, old cellar by creating a new living space that adds nearly 1,000 square feet to the home. Then, Nicole indulges her most glamorous fantasy in the master suite.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Water: The Good, the Bad and the Money
programme.desc: MJ and Mike get a good deal on a St. Lawrence River eyesore in the Thousand Islands but inherit a house full of asbestos and are forced to call in a remediation team.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Demo, Digging and Dancing
programme.desc: Mike and MJ add a partial second story to the country house while dangerous structural issues in the river house force them to take down the roof and second floor walls.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Nisswa Cabin
programme.desc: When a family's inherited 60-year-old lakeside cabin needs updating and more room for gatherings, the brothers blow out the back wall to take over the huge porch.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Rachel takes on a row home that is double the width of a regular row house in the popular Dickinson Narrows neighbourhood. The renovation goes from a cosmetic rehab to a full gut job as she discovers serious plumbing issues.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Anything But Basic
programme.desc: Rachael takes on a builder-basic row home in Philadelphia's East Passyunk neighborhood and intends to flip it fast. Her plan for converting this home into a designer-chic abode includes rebuilding the kitchen peninsula and creating entertaining space.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1817 Chopped-Up Kitchen
programme.desc: Brandon, the owner of an 1817 stone house, needs help with his kitchen. The kitchen was converted from a side porch in the 1970s, but the strange layout and the materials don't match the rest of the house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1713 Dueling Fireplaces
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin is called on to restore a dated foyer and a huge living room with two fireplaces in a 1713 stone house. He and his team must make the dueling fireplaces work together while also bringing warmth and historic charm to the spaces.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1732 Kitchen Relocation
programme.desc: Jeff visits a couple at their 1732 home to address their wish to build a new kitchen in their living room. During the renovation, they face a few bumps as they knock down a wall, relocate the plumbing and try to bring some history back to the space.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1735 Master Bedroom Retreat
programme.desc: Jeff meets up with a homeowner to restore the living room and bedroom in the oldest portion of her 1735 stone home. Jeff lowers an historic mantel in the living room and turns the master into a retreat with a wall of stone.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Kitchen and Dining Room
programme.desc: A couple have just bought an historic stone home with portions built in the 1700s, 1800s, and 1990s. They want Jeff to look at their dining room, kitchen and sunroom. They want a more open floor plan, but Jeff will have to move stone walls.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Living Room and Kitchen
programme.desc: Fred and Elizabeth call on carpenter Jeff Devlin to restore two spaces in their 1800s stone home. Their living room lacks historic character, and their kitchen sits in a 1950s addition, with dated metal cabinets, pine paneling, and linoleum floors.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s First Floor Surprises
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is called on by Meghan and Justin to restore three rooms in their 1803 stone farmhouse. The team gets to work on the dining room, parlour and living room. They uncover a massive surprise when they start digging in the parlour.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1751 Two-Floor Restoration
programme.desc: A mother and daughter bring Jeff in to restore two rooms in the original portion of their 1751 stone home. Jeff and his team give the dining room a slightly formal farmhouse feel. Then they achieve a rustic and refined style in the bathroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1780 Spring House Revival
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin is called on by John and Karine to do a total restoration of their 1780 spring house, which is in dire need of help. The joists and floorboards are almost completely rotten, and the painted stone is crumbling.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1790 Three-Room Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff meets Allen and Kathleen, a couple who wants him to restore three rooms in the original portion of their 1790 home. Jeff and his team dig into each space, uncovering a few unique original details and adding other historic features.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Spanish Colonial Ranch Revival
programme.desc: Brett takes on a Spanish Colonial Revival that has had all of the beautiful original woodwork covered over with layers of paint. It's painstaking work to bring it back and the team hits some serious snags.

programme.title: Restored: 1915 Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Brett Waterman gets the chance to restore an enormous Arts and Crafts home with six bedrooms for a family that grew from four children to eight children in just two years.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Victorian Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian Bungalow for a military veteran and his daughter. The project grows in scale when unexpected problems are discovered and it becomes a complete restoration.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way. He's challenged with finding a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while still making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Cheat Day
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson gears up for his favourite day of the week- cheat day! It's a full-on sugar and carb overload with everything from cakes to shakes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Adam goes to Alaska for a massive burger, a mountainous breakfast and a monster challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolicious
programme.desc: We're getting the inside scoop on all things chocolate. Alton Brown takes a trip to Charleston, S.C., for some heavenly chocolate pudding, while Aaron Sanchez has some not-so-classic New York pizza.

programme.title: Trick or Eat
programme.desc: Chef Carla Hall criss-crosses America to scare up some ghoulishly good grub and tricked-out treats, including mouth-watering zombie burgers in Atlanta, colossal freak shakes in Salem, Mass., and monstrous Franken-chops in New Orleans.

programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Live Fire
programme.desc: Kaz officially joins the Aces, as does Yeager—who trains them to become better combat pilots. Meanwhile, Tam learns what it's like to be a First Order pilot.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: A Day In The Life
Big Hero 6: The Series: Countdown to Catastrophe: Part 3
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Foot Club
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: Sky Pirates...In the Sky!
programme.desc: Tired of being ignored by his family, Dewey’s search for attention goes too far when he falls in with flamboyant Don Karnage and his cutthroat gang of Singing Sky Pirates.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: The Fancy Gentleman/ Springtime/ Roll' Em
Mickey Mouse Shorts: Panda-monium/ Stayin' Cool/ Ghoul Friend
Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Brain Drain/ Hair Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia snags Pandora's Box from Mavis and asks Zombie Isaac Newton to figure out how to open it. Unfortunately, a brain swap between him and Hank creates bigger problems. When Medusa comes to Hotel Transylvania, Aunt Lydia's hair acts up.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fangceanera
programme.desc: Mavis is turning 115, so it's time for her Fangceanera. This vampire rite of passage means that she'll finally earn her Dracula cape. In order to do that, however, she must complete a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Globby Within
programme.desc: Nega-Globby begins to take control of Globby’s body in order to cause chaos around the city turning Globby from adored hero to a wanted criminal overnight!

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Halloween Spooktacular
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Parker's Gotta Go
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Take Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man is excited to start his second year as a superhero and as a student at Horizon High but discovers that Doc Ock also claims to want a second chance.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lake Nose Monster
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb set out to rescue the mysterious Lake Nose monster from the effects of living in a zinc-less lake.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: That's the Spirit!/ The Curse of Candace
programme.desc: It's Halloween night and the kids encounter a strange boy and his father who are convinced their house is haunted. Then, Candace is bitten by a bat after watching a popular vampire movie and worries that she is becoming a vampire.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Hyde vs. Phi
programme.desc: Driven by their rocky history, Phi challenges Hyde to a battle, intent on taking back what’s his. It’s brother against brother as the pair clash with all the power of their resonance.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Drawn with the Wind!
programme.desc: Our heroes’ visit to a popular tourist attraction ends up being anything but a breeze!

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Push, Pull, Pogo

programme.title: Movie: Monster House
programme.desc: Three kids try to convince everyone in town that a neighbourhood house is alive. When no one believes them, they decide to enter the house and solve the mystery.

programme.title: Movie: Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: In 1693 Salem, three sisters are executed for practicing witchcraft. Three hundred years later, a sceptic named Max explores the ruins of the legendary witches' house and dares the witches to manifest themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Scooby-Doo
programme.desc: Scooby Doo and the gang are brought to an island resort to investigate strange events.

programme.title: Movie: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: The Scooby squad is back at it, this time trying to track down a masked villain who wreaks havoc at the Coolsville Museum of Criminology.

programme.title: Movie: Monsters, Inc.
programme.desc: Monsters like Mike and Sulley work in the factory, Monsters, Inc. that collects the screams of children and turns them into energy that powers their city, Monstropolis.

programme.title: Bones: The Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: The Jeffersonian team investigates the death of a professional ballroom dancer who was murdered three days before her audition on a popular dancing competition show. In order to solve the case, Brennan and Booth go undercover as dance competitors.

programme.title: Bones: The Archaeologist in the Cocoon
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a well-known archeologist with a questionable reputation, who came upon a career-defining discovery right before his death.

programme.title: Bones: The Twist in the Plot
programme.desc: The Jeffersonian team investigates the remains of two bodies that were found at the same burial plot: one of a female cancer patient; the other, the cancer patient's 'doula,' who was guiding her through her grieving process with the illness.

programme.title: Movie: Maleficent
programme.desc: An act of betrayal turns a fairy's heart to stone and leads her to curse her enemy's newborn daughter, the princess. It becomes apparent as the child grows, however, that she may in fact be the key to restoring peace to the land.

programme.title: Movie: Cinderella
programme.desc: A kind-hearted young woman is treated with cruelty and disdain by her stepmother and stepsisters. She's forbidden to attend an open ball at the castle, but a kindly beggar woman steps in with a pumpkin, some mice and a little magic.

programme.title: Movie: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: A by-the-book cop must learn to step out of the box when she assigned to escort the gregarious wife of a drug boss to testify against the head of a drug cartel. As they race through Texas, the women must flee crooked cops and gunmen alike.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Knockout
programme.desc: After the Belle Chase Navy Chaplain and pastor at Clearwater Baptist is murdered, Pride believes he found a connection between Mayor Hamilton and the illegal activity taking place in Clearwater. Also, Percy continues to face repercussions from a case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Pride's long-time friend, state and military attorney asks NCIS to investigate the disappearance of a JAG lawyer who specializes in classified cases and volunteers at a private military academy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly
programme.desc: A highly credentialed and skilled Special Ops Marine sends Pride and the team on a city-wide manhunt after he assaults six men in a bar.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Slay the Dragon
programme.desc: Tammy is reunited with her ex-husband, who disappeared after embezzling $80 million in Katrina relief funds, after he is linked to the murder of a crime boss' son.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Quid Pro Quo
programme.desc: While investigating a deadly accident at a naval base, the NCIS team finds out a unit of Seabees was poisoned with a contagious supervirus. Also, during an autopsy, Wade is infected with the virus and given hours to live if an antidote can't be found.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: NOLA Confidential
programme.desc: After the NCIS team uncovers a link between a drug ring and the New Orleans Police Department, Lasalle must investigate his former partner in the Vice unit. Also, Pride worries about Rita's safety as she looks into illegal activity in Clearwater.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Krewe
programme.desc: While Pride listens in on a wiretap of Mayor Hamilton, the NCIS team investigates a train heist of hundreds of Navy weapons.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Jon Moxley and PAC face off in the main event. In the Tag Team Tournament semifinals: Lucha Bros. vs. Private Party, Dark Order vs. SCU, Young Bucks vs. Best Friends. Plus, Dr. Britt Baker returns to her hometown.

programme.title: Movie: Shooter
programme.desc: A sniper who was abandoned behind enemy lines is called back to service when a plot to assassinate the president is revealed.

programme.title: Movie: Collateral
programme.desc: Cab driver Max Durocher's dreams of owning his own limo company are threatened when he agrees to drive a stranger to five locations. He soon finds himself involved with the criminal activities of a contract killer.

programme.title: Movie: Law Abiding Citizen
programme.desc: After one of the men who killed his wife and daughter is set free, Clyde Shelton takes justice into his own hands and begins taking out everyone that was connected to the case.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween H2O: 20 Years Later
programme.desc: Twenty years after killings on Halloween, Laurie Strode has built a new life for herself and her son, but her psychotic brother, Michael Myers, is after her again.

programme.title: Movie: Leprechaun
programme.desc: After being locked up in a basement for ten years, an evil leprechaun goes on a murder spree while seeking to regain his pot of gold stolen from him.

programme.title: Movie: Leprechaun 2
programme.desc: Leprechaun's bride to be already has a boyfriend, so he plans on kidnapping her. Her boyfriend and his uncle comprise a plan to rescue her. When his uncle gets greedy the boyfriend is on his own leaping through Leprechaun's surprises.

programme.title: Movie: Leprechaun 3
programme.desc: When a college student acquires a lucky coin, he is stalked by a murderous leprechaun to whom it belongs.

programme.title: Movie: Leprechaun 4: In Space
programme.desc: A leprechaun kidnaps an alien princess to gain her title and become king, but the space marines rush to her rescue as they try not to be killed by the leprechaun.

programme.title: Movie: Leprechaun in the Hood
programme.desc: A notorious leprechaun is awakened in the hip-hop community of Compton.

programme.title: Movie: Leprechaun: Back 2 Tha Hood
programme.desc: An evil leprechaun pursues three teenagers after they find his chest of gold.

programme.title: Eli Roth's History of Horror: Killer Creatures
programme.desc: Monsters hold a special place in the history of horror, from killer predators in nature to the nightmare creatures of the fantastic.

programme.title: Movie: Cujo
programme.desc: A rabid Saint Bernard terrorizes a mother and her son, who are trapped in their car.

programme.title: Movie: Eight Legged Freaks
programme.desc: A group of predatory spiders grow to monumental proportions and wreak havoc on a town.

programme.title: Movie: Lake Placid
programme.desc: A small town faces some mysterious deaths surrounding their calm, deep lake. After finding a tooth, a gigantic crocodile is found to reside in the depths of the lake. A game warden, a palaeontologist and a crocodile hunter attempt to kill the crocodile.

programme.title: Movie: Jaws
programme.desc: A great white shark attacks and terrorizes the residents of a Long Island beach town.

programme.title: Movie: Jaws 2
programme.desc: A killer great white shark's mate returns to the same waters to prey on a group of teens.

programme.title: Movie: Coming to America
programme.desc: An African prince travels to America to avoid an arranged marriage and find a new bride.

programme.title: Movie: Remember the Titans

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: Movie: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective

programme.desc: A woman must return to her hometown to care for her aunt during the Christmas break. While there, she meets a man and learns there is no place like home for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Letters to Santa
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town for Christmas and discovers that the town's historic general store has shut down. Using the skills she has as a retail designer, she is determined to bring the store back to life in time for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Switched for Christmas
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters decide to swap lives for the holidays, learning valuable lessons along the way.

programme.title: Movie: Mingle All the Way
programme.desc: A young entrepreneur invents a new dating app designed to help singles find dates to events. She personally tests it out in the weeks before Christmas and is connected with a like-minded individual whom she's already dated, several times.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Promise
programme.desc: Two strangers who share a disdain for Christmas navigate their holiday complications together by creating The Mistletoe Promise. As they spend more time with each other, they discover there may be more to their contract.

programme.title: Movie: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A single mother who's lost all interest in Christmas finds just what she needs when her uncle comes to visit.

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Holiday
programme.desc: A royal princess runs off from her obligations for a few days to see how the other half lives around Christmas. She winds up falling for a good Samaritan who is unaware of her real identity.

programme.title: Movie: With Love, Christmas
programme.desc: An ad executive and her uptight co-worker must create the ultimate Christmas commercial. To complicate things, they are also each-others Secret Santa.

programme.title: Movie: A Dream of Christmas
programme.desc: A restless young married woman is granted a wish by a Christmas Angel to be single again. She soon realizes that her new life isn't what she bargained for and embarks on a quest to win her husband back.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Cookies
programme.desc: A small-town factory, Aunt Sally's Christmas Cookie Company, is sold to large conglomerate. Their executive must seal the deal and shut down the factory, the town's lifeblood, but things become complicated when she meets the new owner.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant is asked to stay for Christmas by a family after she returns a package left on a plane by a passenger and misses her connection back home.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: An interior designer is made-of-honour at her friend’s wedding. Before the big day, she ends up stranded in the Christmas Cottage, where rumour has it, all guests will find everlasting love, with the brother of the bride.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: The author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his young niece and nephew for the holidays.

programme.title: South Park: You're Not Yelping
programme.desc: Cartman considers himself the top online restaurant reviewer in South Park.

programme.title: South Park: The Problem with a Poo

programme.title: South Park: World War Zimmerman
programme.desc: Cartman sees Token as a threat to all humanity.

programme.title: South Park: Poor and Stupid
programme.desc: Cartman dreams of becoming a NASCAR driver and he's willing to do whatever it takes to make it happen, even if that means giving up all of his toys and money.

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: The boys must embrace the latest fad to hit South Park Elementary or risk their status as the coolest kids in school.

programme.title: South Park: SUPER HARD PCness

programme.title: South Park: Sponsored Content
programme.desc: Jimmy's integrity as a newsman runs smack into PC Principal's ideology.

programme.title: South Park: Truth and Advertising
programme.desc: PC Principal disappears with two of the fourth-grade students.

programme.title: South Park: PC Principal Final Justice
programme.desc: Kyle has chosen a dangerous alliance over his friendship with Stan.

programme.title: South Park: Band in China
programme.desc: Randy sees an opportunity for Tegridy in China.

programme.title: South Park: Let Them Eat Goo
programme.desc: Cartman is sure the new plant-based diet in the school cafeteria gave him a heart attack.

programme.title: Comedy Central Stand-Up Presents: Dulcé Sloan

programme.title: Comedy Central Stand-Up Presents: Will Miles
programme.desc: Will Miles describes the roles he usually lands for commercials and details a strange loophole to buying legal weed in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: South Park: Whale Whores
programme.desc: Stan takes action to stop the Japanese from killing the world's whales and dolphins.

programme.title: South Park: About Last Night...
programme.desc: While the country celebrates the outcome of the election, the new President-elect catches everyone off guard when he arrives at the White House prematurely.

programme.title: South Park: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The children of South Park are drawn to 'Mr. Jefferson,' the new neighbour in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get 'Mr. Jefferson' to love him best.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)
programme.desc: A freak accident leaves the Elementary school bus teetering precariously on the edge of a cliff, and it's up to Ms. Crabtree to find help. While they wait, the kids reflect on their adventures and how they got out of so many 'sticky situations.'

programme.title: South Park: ManBearPig
programme.desc: The boys are trapped in a cave and Cartman finds a treasure. Meanwhile, Al Gore shows up in town to warn the citizens about the threat of ManBearPig.

programme.title: South Park: Free Willzyx
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park: Douche and Turd
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one. When Stan refuses to vote for the ridiculous choices, Puff Daddy shows up and tells him to 'vote or die.'

programme.title: Archer: Archer Danger Island: A Warrior in Costume
programme.desc: Archer keeps an eye out for a past nemesis.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Camping

programme.title: The Office: Survivor Man

programme.desc: Michael and Dwight decide to surprise Ryan in New York for a night of clubbing. Meanwhile, the Scranton branch is upset when they find out they have to come in on a Saturday for Ryan's website project. Jim's plan to save them has unexpected results.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.desc: A small-town electrician sits on Texas death row for the murder of a 19-year-old college student, but forensic science could exonerate him.

programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express

programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Crisis in the Klondike
programme.desc: A crisis in the Klondike forces Parker, Rick and Tony to take massive gambles to strike it rich and hunt for gold on new grounds. The setback hits just as the price of gold spikes, sparking a new gold rush to the area.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: A New Rush Begins Part 1
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: The mining season is only getting worse in what may be their toughest year yet. Poor planning is costing Parker millions, while Tony's only chance at pay dirt is a long shot and Rick's wash plant runs dry.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: A New Rush Begins Part 2
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: The mining season is only getting worse in what may be their toughest year yet. Poor planning is costing Parker millions, while Tony's only chance at pay dirt is a long shot and Rick's wash plant runs dry.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Nugget Hunter
programme.desc: Rick and his dad fly high into Keno mountains on a treasure hunt. Parker makes a decision about his crew that could determine the fate of his season. Tony checks a spot the old dredges missed and assesses which of his kids might take over one day.

programme.title: Finding Escobar's Millions: Pablo's Inner Circle
programme.desc: Two former Medellin cartel members provide new intel that sends Chris and Jerry to investigate cocaine labs and secret hideouts in the remote Columbian countryside.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Alligator Egg Collector
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty as he forages the swamps of Louisiana in search of alligator eggs 90,000 of them to be exact. It's a job that is helping to preserve the population of the American alligator.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Billboard Installer
programme.desc: Mike Rowe teams up with an outdoor advertising company in Texas that teaches the tricks of a very dirty trade.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Well Digger
programme.desc: After joining the Bowie BaySox team as a groundskeeper, Mike joins the Watson Water Company and digs through mud, rock, gravel, sand and water as they drill for heating and water in Tennessee.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: A team of workers round up a flock of wild geese in the tundra, with airplanes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mule Logger

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Big Animal Vet
programme.desc: Mike joins forces with a big animal veterinarian in Montana that has the dirty job of caring for sick farm animals, jumping into the role of apprentice veterinarian as he learns how to take care of a lama with an abscessed tooth.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Leather Tanner
programme.desc: Mike steps back in time when he joins Richard Meyers and his sons in the ancient art of tanning leather. At their tannery in New York Mike rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty turning stiff cowhides into soft suede soles for bowling shoes.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: I Want to Go Back

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Halloween Party

programme.title: Mom: Crazy Hair and a Teeny Tiny Part of Canada

programme.title: Mom: A Small Nervous Breakdown and a Misplaced Fork
programme.desc: Christy goes on her first date since she stopped drinking. Meanwhile, Bonnie teaches her grandson, Roscoe, to gamble.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Croaked!/ New Haunts
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog. Then, when Ronnie Anne forgoes a family Halloween tradition for a 'cool' party, she learns 'cool' doesn't always mean 'fun'.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Blood, Sweetbriar, and Tears

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Overmining
programme.desc: Captain 'CJ' is having major problems with a big case, and Jake and Holt find the motivation to help him out. Inside the precinct, war ensues when Terry enforces a green initiative and tells Gina to get rid of her precious space heater.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Capt. Latvia
programme.desc: Charles enlists Jake's help in tracking down his son's favourite toy for Christmas, and the pair finds themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian criminal ring as a result.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Fugitive Pt.1
programme.desc: A mass escape of convicts from a prison van in the streets of Brooklyn sends the entire squad on a manhunt. The only key witness? Former NFL running back Marshawn Lynch.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Fugitive Pt. 2
programme.desc: Meanwhile, Jake and Amy place a bet on who can bring in the most escaped convicts and the loser has to move into the winner’s apartment. Then, with only one fugitive still on the loose, Jake enlists a surprising ally.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: The Misery Index: That Milk Must Have Turned by Now
programme.desc: Contestants guess the misery of some traumatic real-life events for the chance at $30,000.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Men of Intellect
programme.desc: Joe and Q become 'gentlemen', a little piggy goes to the emergency room, and a man rides the elevator from hell as a clumsy paramedic and accidental sexter battle to be masters of misery.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Fingering the Man
programme.desc: Molly Austin takes a bachelorette party to the next level, and Jonathan Martin's parents give new meaning to the word 'cheap'. Plus, if you thought your family was embarrassing, Rachel Feinstein's might have them beat.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Crazy in Love
programme.desc: Brad Williams brings the heat, 'Street Fighter' style, Sydnee Washington has a hot date with Father Time, Yamaneika daydreams about being kidnapped, and Calvin Evans gets less than he bargained for on his no-frills plane ticket.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Up All Night
programme.desc: The hilarious Sydney Castillo wants that old thing back, aka his hair. Plus, funny woman Rachel Feinstein has her hands full on a playdate, and the hysterical Mark Viera feels the spirit of the wildcat in his new kicks.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pumpkin Spice Bride
programme.desc: Comedian Corey Rodrigues' mind is playing tricks on him, Calvin Evans gives up his seat on the bus (then asks for it back), and the hilarious Yamaneika is a maid with no honor at her friend's pumpkin spice-themed wedding.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Immigration
programme.desc: Adam illustrates the big problem a border wall wouldn't address, explores the history of racist deportations, and explains how immigration courts are a huge mess.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Housing
programme.desc: While looking for a new home, Adam exposes the harsh realities of real estate. Plus, he explains why helping the homeless is a lot simpler than you think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Drugs
programme.desc: Adam weeds through the myths of marijuana, exposes the blunt truth about the War on Drugs, and explains how prescription pills are the true gateway drug.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Prison
programme.desc: Adam and Eve shed light on jail rehabilitation, solitary confinement and the fact that corporations make money off of prison inmates.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 14

programme.desc: Ron, Diane and Leslie attend a wood working awards dinner after Ron receives a nomination.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Two Parties
programme.desc: Ann throws a bachelorette party for Leslie and Chris throws a game night at Ben's.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Women in Garbage
programme.desc: In order to get more women in government, Leslie and April handle a garbage route. Tom learns about basketball from Andy and Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ann's Decision
programme.desc: After several unsuccessful relationships Ann makes a dramatic life decision. Ben enlists the help of Chris, Tom and Ron to choose a caterer for the wedding.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Emergency Response
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben organize a black tie gala to raise money for their park, but their plans are derailed when a city wide emergency response drill is called.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Leslie and Ben
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben have only two hours to complete a year-long project. Ron gets in trouble when his temper gets the better of him.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Correspondent's Lunch
programme.desc: Leslie's planned address for a big media event is stolen, leaving her speechless. Ben starts his new job.

programme.title: Movie: 17 Again
programme.desc: A man, who feels a great deal of regret about his life choices, wishes he could go back in time to change a few things. One morning, he wakes up to find he's been given a second chance to be 17 again.

programme.title: Movie: Shallow Hal
programme.desc: Following the advice of his dying father, Hal Larson dates only physically beautiful women. When he is hypnotized by self-help guru Tony Robbins into recognizing only the inner beauty of women, he falls for an obese woman.

programme.title: Movie: 17 Again
programme.desc: A man, who feels a great deal of regret about his life choices, wishes he could go back in time to change a few things. One morning, he wakes up to find he's been given a second chance to be 17 again.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Guy's traveling all over the country searching for a taste of the South.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' the Extra Mile
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' to some joints going all-in on some classic comfort foods. In Chicago, the burger joint with Asian flare proudly serves all things umami. In Memphis, a high-end chef takes low-down Southern staples to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Focused
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Syracuse and Nags Head that have a definite direction.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eurocentric
programme.desc: Guy feasts on the many tastes of Europe in places across the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From the Heart
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some spots putting their heart and soul into everything they do. In Carlsbad, Calif., a family-owned Italian joint is staying true to a long-standing ravioli recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Key West
programme.desc: Guy's checking out some of the awesome eats of Key West, Fla. From a funky little shack serving up New England seafood with coastal twists to a husband and wife team dishing up standout fish tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Atlantic to Pacific
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting a far-out taste of both coasts. In Bakersfield, Calif., a 75-year-old steakhouse fires up savoury stuffed pork chops and legit lobster mac 'n' cheese. Across town, a Latin-American fusion joint cranks out chicken and tri-tip.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headed coast to coast, from north to south. In Somers Point, N.J., he meets up with Rachael vs. Guy Kids Cookoff contestant Gibson Borelli at the local legend dishin' out righteous crab-stuffed flounder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked and Barbecued
programme.desc: Things are cookin' all kinds of ways in Flavortown. First, Guy Fieri checks in on a diner in San Diego where law enforcement hones their skills and stuffs their gills.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Loaded, Stuffed and Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into joints that are loading it, stuffing it and frying it. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-to-table gem putting out hearty goodness like bison gravy fries and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern to South American
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into Southern comfort food and South American specialties. In Atlanta, a real-deal soul food spot dishing out collard green lasagna and a twist on fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Pork to Pot Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri starts things off internationally as he brings the whole family to his favourite jerk joint in Ocho Rios, Jamaica. Then it's back to the States, where a cafeteria in Tucker, Ga. hasn't changed a thing - including its true Southern staples.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coming Together In Cali
programme.desc: For this trip, Guy Fieri zeroes in on Chico, California, celebrating the town's food scene as residents and restaurant owners recover from ravaging fires that rocked the area.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Buns and Bagels
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, an amped up deli serves lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spooky Surprises
programme.desc: The Kitchen is serving up some tricks and even better treats for Halloween with Jeff Mauro's monster mac and cheese and Katie Lee's butternut squash soup. Learn fun and easy ways to make frightening food crafts and ideas for decor and dessert.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Just Candy
programme.desc: Ina shares her favourite candy recipes perfect for gifting. There's candy for all ages, pillowy marshmallows and white chocolate bark. Then, Ina's making a winter squash soup as a thank you gift to top candy queen Dylan Lauren.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Halloween Open House
programme.desc: Giada hosts a Halloween open house for neighborhood trick-or-treaters and their parents. She decorates the living room and kitchen to look like a haunted house and creates spooky menu.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Halloween Prep
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her friend Glenda try out Halloween costume ideas and test recipes like Jack-O-Lantern stuffed peppers, roasted butternut squash with spooky chips, caramel apples and a black light cocktail.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Friends And Chocolate
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites the ladies over for a girls' lunch. The menu includes linguine with braised red wine short rib sauce, marinated roasted portobellos, chocolate cherry martinis and classic molten chocolate cake with cassis berries.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sweet Talk
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is celebrating the opening of her new sweet shop with a lineup of treats and sundaes. She makes incredible, old-fashioned Jeweled Divinity and shares the secrets to two of the over-the-top sundaes she serves at the parlor.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: There's a burning on the prairie, but in Ree Drummond's kitchen, everything is sweet, stocked up and frozen. She's making mini chocolate-pecan-caramel cheesecakes that are elegant enough for impromptu entertaining and simple ice cream truffles two ways.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Dinner to Die For
programme.desc: The kitchen is full of spooky surprises and a petrifying party menu perfect for Halloween. To start, there's Jeff Mauro's 'mummified' beef wellington and Katie Lee's wild rice-stuffed acorn squash. Also, a terrifying touch test to delight party guests.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Ghoulish Gatsby
programme.desc: With Halloween around the corner, Trisha Yearwood gets decked out in her best Roaring Twenties look and gets help from her friend, Glenda, to decorate for guests arriving to their Ghoulish Gatsby Party.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Sweet and Spicy

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Gravely Delicious Desserts

programme.desc: Otter couple Diego and Icana are best friends but have never mated, so keepers decide to replace Diego with a new male Tarubu. They hope that young Tarubu will relight Icana's fire and that they will provide Chester with long awaited otter pups.

programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: The Zoo: Andre the Baby Goat

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Death on the Mountain

programme.desc: The team uncover a potential booby trap, and their first hint of treasure in a cave that may have been a headquarters for General Yamashita during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Nazi Concrete

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Fix-It-All

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Feline and Sinker
programme.desc: From gimpy goats to belligerent bulls, families all around are relying on Pol Veterinary Service to take care of their animals this summer.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Places

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
